work_unit: MM-M005: clamp partial-fill f64 precision drift at engine.rs L820
situation: audit-2026-07-04-002 finding MM-M005 originally noted 'engine.rs L640 fill_quantity as f64 precision loss'. Code review revealed L640 cast (i64→f64 for turnover) is safe within A-share scale; actual risk is L820 `(max_quantity as f64 * fill_ratio).ceil() as i64` where f64 multiplication can round up and ceil produces value > max_quantity, allowing single-tick over-fill.
action: Added F64_EXACT_INT_MAX (2^53-1) constant + eprintln warning when max_quantity exceeds exact-int range. Applied `.min(max_quantity)` clamp BEFORE ceil so proposed <= max_quantity invariant holds regardless of magnitude. Compile-checked via `cargo check -p moni-engine`. Committed directly in worktree per case-104 guidance (cp-guard rejects already-diverged engine.rs).
outcome_evidence: Commit 96580fc on auto/opt-moni-engine-1782949388 pushed to origin. cargo check -p moni-engine passed with 0 errors. Diff: +18/-1 lines at L818-837 adding const + warning + min-clamp before ceil.
next_suggestion: 派生 fix #9: MM-M006 (engine.rs L424-433 attempt_match error path doesn't save order for partial fills). 或 MM-M008 (llm.rs silent MockLlmClient fallback).

audit_findings.finding: (max_quantity as f64 * fill_ratio).ceil() as i64 can exceed max_quantity when max_quantity approaches 2^53 due to f64 rounding + ceil compounding upward drift
audit_findings.remediation: Add .min(max_quantity) clamp after ceil; emit eprintln warning when max_quantity > F64_EXACT_INT_MAX
